commitMessage:
Squashed commit of the following:

commit e33faa875bb3471a4d80eca731794c01b77ba859
Author: Yuze Jiang <i@uiryuu.moe>
Date:   Thu Jun 25 13:21:05 2026 +0900

    ui: fix crash on macOS 12; change fallback symbol for plugin

commit e488be2fef9aa65ee9e2d82a2efcfee8c677213e
Author: Yuze Jiang <i@uiryuu.moe>
Date:   Thu Jun 25 11:48:49 2026 +0900

    ui: fix a bug where mute state isn't reflected in main window

commit 0ec905f0e72933832943581cc152a53660de1dca
Author: Yuze Jiang <i@uiryuu.moe>
Date:   Tue Jun 23 19:12:38 2026 +0900

    ui: optimize usage of symbols

    This commit:
    - Removed unused icon files
    - Use `repeat` and `speaker.wave` instead of old "loop" and "volume" icons
      - The "loop" icons was acutally made from sfsymbols before
    - Use `plus`, `minus`, and `trash` from sfsymbols
    - Change the repeat button type from toggle to momentary push in

    Visual changes:
    - The volume symbol is now always centered (same as Music.app)
    - The `minus` is shaper on lower resolution displays
    - Fix the repeat button changes state when pressed (before releasing)
